issue_title: fix: workspace switch disconnects user instead of switching
issue_body_preview: The switchWorkspace backend method used TenantAwareCrudService through EmployeeService and UserService, which forcefully scopes all queries to RequestContext.currentTenantId() (the OLD workspace). This caused employee lookup, JWT token generation, and refresh token storage to all fail with 'record n
test_description_zh: 在多工作区（租户）环境下，登录用户后，点击工作区切换功能，选择另一个工作区进行切换，观察切换后的用户状态和页面表现。
expected_result_zh: 用户成功切换到目标工作区，页面正常加载新工作区的数据和界面，用户保持登录状态不会被断开连接或登出，切换后能正常使用新工作区的各项功能。
